/CAL: CPO TERMINATION/X: THIS MATTER WAS DISMISSED ON 8-26-21 PURSUANT TO1001,83PC/X: PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE TERMINATION OF THE CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER/SATERM/X: ORDER TERMINATING THE STAY AWAY ORDER WAS NOT PRESENTED FOR SIGNATURE BY THE JUDGE NOR FILED IN OPEN COURT,/RESTR/

/CAL:PTD PROGRESS REPORT/DAWT/FAVRPT/X:THE DEFENDANT HAS COMPLETED THERAPY/CTORD:GENERAL ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION AS TO ANY & ALL VICTIMS INTHIS MATTER/CTORD:PTD IS RELIEVED/TEXT: COURT GRTS MOTION TO DISM PURS PC1001,83 AS TO COUNT 1 & 2 /1001,83:1 & 2

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFFICER THOMAS REDMOND/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1, PHOTO OF VICTIM'S PROFILE AND INJURY TO RIGHT SIDE OF NECK; PEOPLE'S 2, CLOSE-UP PHOTO OF VICTIM'S PROFILE AND INJURY TO RIGHT SIDEOF NECK;PEOPLE'S 3, PHOTO OF INJURY TO LEFT SIDE OF NECK; DEFENSE A, BOOKING PHOTO/X:BASED UPON THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED AT THE PRELIMINARY HEARING, THE COMPLAINT IS CONFORMED TO PROOF,/MISD4:1,2/871D:3/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) &DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/
